hero.subtitle: High-quality coffee roasted with passion. Enjoy an unforgettable coffee experience only at Singa Muda Coffee.

story.title: Singamuda Coffee Philosophy
story.p1: Singamuda Coffee was born from a deep love for the rich local coffee beans of Bali, specifically the legendary Kintamani mountains. We believe that every cup of coffee carries a long story, from the farmers' dedication, the roaster's precision, to our baristas' expertise.

best_seller.subtitle: Our signature coffee and treats that customers hunt for every single day.

coffee_menu.subtitle: A wide selection of coffee, non-coffee beverages, and delicious snacks to accompany your day.

roastery.subtitle: Freshly roasted coffee beans for your cafe and shop needs. We serve wholesale purchases.

news.title: News & Activities
news.subtitle: Follow the latest updates and exciting events at Singa Muda Coffee.
news.empty: No news has been published yet.

footer.about_desc: Serving quality coffee with authentic Indonesian taste to fuel your spirit.
